context: Rules used during reimbursement validation for conference meal receipts.
policy_summary: Aaron and Sensei Tom do not run a formal reimbursement flow. Any personal outlay for the dojo (Home Depot supplies, cash prize purse, etc.) is logged directly as a QuickBooks expense against the appropriate acc_* category with an attached receipt. See expenses.json.
note: Any dojo commitment at or above $175 requires Aaron's explicit approval before it is placed, regardless of category.
